message:
feat(freeze): Convert push constant operations to Zig

Added helper methods:
- emitPushInt: Push integer constants using JS_MKVAL
- emitPushJSConst: Push JS constants (JS_TRUE, JS_FALSE, etc.)

Converted operations:
- Integer constants: push_minus1, push_0 through push_7, push_i8, push_i16, push_i32
- Boolean constants: push_true, push_false
- Special values: undefined (JS_UNDEFINED), null (JS_NULL)
- Objects: object (JS_NewObject), push_this (FROZEN_DUP of this_val)
- Strings: push_empty_string (JS_NewString with "")

All push operations now use:
- stack[@intCast(sp)] = value; sp += 1 in Zig
- PUSH(value) macro in C (unchanged for backward compat)
